lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any scratches, dents, or rust. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear or damage. All mechanical systems are fully functional and have been properly maintained.
Poor condition.
The car is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical components are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior paint is in great shape with a strong finish, though there are a few minor stone chips on the front bumper and a tiny scratch on the rear fender. The interior is clean and shows only light wear on the driver's seat consistent with its age. Mechanically, it runs smoothly and has a complete service history. It is a reliable car that is ready for its next owner.

Looking for a budget-friendly project with tons of potential? This car is the perfect opportunity for a DIY enthusiast or someone handy! While it definitely needs some significant mechanical attention and cosmetic TLC to get back to its best, it's an incredibly affordable entry point. It has served its previous owners well and is now ready for someone with the right skills to give it a second life!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is sold strictly as-is, recommended for parts or a total restoration project. It is currently not roadworthy and will require a trailer for transport. The engine has significant internal failure, the transmission slips badly, and there are multiple fluid leaks throughout. The exterior shows heavy rust on the rocker panels, several large dents, and peeling clear coat. Inside, the cabin has significant wear, including cracked dash components and torn seating. Please expect a vehicle that requires extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure peak performance and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean history and well-preserved interior, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver seeking a balanced combination of luxury and value.

Hey there! Thanks so much for stopping by! I’m looking to find a brand new home for this awesome ride. It’s been super reliable and is still in really nice shape—perfect for your daily commutes or those fun weekend road trips! I’ve taken great care of it, and it’s totally ready to hit the road with you today. I'm offering a sweet deal to get things moving, so don't be shy—reach out and let's get you behind the wheel!
Offering a driver-spec E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six. This unit has undergone critical preventative maintenance
Used vehicle. Good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle has been meticulously cared for and presents beautifully. The exterior paint maintains a high-gloss finish, showing only the lightest signs of careful road use consistent with its age. Inside, the interior is exceptionally clean; the seating surfaces and dashboard remain in great shape, free of any significant wear, stains, or odors. Under the hood, the engine runs quietly and efficiently, backed by a consistent service history that reflects proactive maintenance. All power features, including the climate control and infotainment system, operate exactly as they should. It offers a smooth, composed ride that makes it ideal for both daily commutes and

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an exceptional balance of performance and reliability. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved interior, this unit serves as a premier choice for those seeking quality without compromise. Each component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for daily operation and long-term value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical upkeep and an interior that reflects responsible ownership, this unit offers a balanced synthesis of performance and longevity. It has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for reliability and aesthetic presentation, making it an ideal choice for those seeking quality and value.

Hey there! Looking for a reliable ride that’s been treated with lots of love? This car is in wonderful shape and ready for its next adventure! It runs smoothly, looks great, and has plenty of life left in it. I’ve really enjoyed driving this beauty, but it's time for it to find a new home. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!
Used car. Condition: good.
Used car. Good condition. Mechanically sound. Clean interior. Recent service completed. Ready to drive.

This meticulously cared-for vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and reliability. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish that has been regularly waxed, showing only the minor imperfections one would expect from careful road use. Inside, you'll find a pristine, smoke-free cabin featuring supple leather upholstery and a dashboard free of any cracks or sun damage. Every button, switch, and technological feature functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in its prime; it has been strictly maintained according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that starts perfectly every time. The tires are in excellent shape with deep tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This is a turn-key vehicle, ready to provide its next owner with years of dependable, comfortable driving.

This vehicle represents an exemplary standard of pre-owned quality, characterized by meticulous maintenance and a refined presentation. It offers a seamless fusion of performance and reliability, ensuring a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to excellence, making it a standout acquisition within its class.

This distinguished vehicle represents an exceptional balance of performance and long-term value. Meticulously maintained and presenting in superior order, it offers a refined driving experience and an aesthetic presence that commands attention. An exemplary selection for the discerning professional seeking a sophisticated, reliable automotive investment.

Hey there! I’m looking to find a new home for this absolute gem of a car. It’s been super reliable for me and is still running beautifully! It’s in really great shape overall—well-loved, well-maintained, and totally ready for all your upcoming adventures. You’re going to love how smooth it drives! It's a fantastic ride for anyone looking for quality and reliability without the brand-new price tag. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The M-DCT dual-clutch transmission provides lightning-fast shifts, paired with the M Variable Differential Lock for optimal lateral traction. This example retains its factory Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and high-pressure VANOS system integrity. Meticulously maintained with recent rod bearing service and throttle actuator replacement, ensuring the high-revving internals remain robust. The chassis rigidity and near 50/50 weight distribution offer a pure mechanical connection, making this a definitive driver's tool for the discerning enthusiast.
Used car. Good condition. Clean interior. Regular maintenance. Reliable.

This meticulously maintained executive sedan offers a refined driving experience and remains in impressive cosmetic and mechanical shape. The exterior paint retains a deep, glass-like luster, with only minor stone chips on the front fascia and a small, light scuff on the rear bumper consistent with careful daily use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of premium materials; the leather seats are supple and free of cracks, though the driver’s side bolster shows very faint entry wear. All onboard technology, including the premium sound system, navigation, and heated seating, operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine is clean and responsive, benefiting from a strict adherence to the manufacturer’s service schedule. We recently replaced the brake rotors and installed a fresh set of all-season tires to ensure the vehicle is road-trip ready. The car comes with a comprehensive folder of service receipts, two sets of keys, and a smoke-free interior history. This is a reliable, high-specification vehicle that bridges the gap between a brand-new showroom model and a standard used car.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This premium pre-owned selection offers a refined balance of performance and reliability, ensuring a superior driving experience for the discerning owner. Thoroughly inspected to meet our rigorous standards, this vehicle represents an exceptional investment for those who prioritize both quality and value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle offers a harmonious blend of performance and sophisticated design. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it remains in commendable condition for the discerning driver. This selection represents a premier opportunity to acquire a reliable, high-caliber motorcar that upholds our dealership's rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness.

Hey everyone! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she's been such a joy to drive! She’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has plenty of life left for your next adventure. I’ve taken great care of her, so you’re getting a fantastic deal on a car that’s ready to hit the road today. Come take a look!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing for a broad torque curve. The power is delivered through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock, ensuring exceptional corner-exit traction. The chassis maintains its factory-spec torsional rigidity, and the suspension geometry provides the communicative feedback expected of a true driver's car. Mechanically sorted with recent valve adjustments and a reinforced subframe, this example offers a visceral, naturally aspirated performance profile in a well-maintained package.
Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between performance and presentation. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, with only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with responsible driving. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and well-preserved; the upholstery shows minimal wear, and all technological features—including the navigation and premium audio system—operate flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It delivers a smooth, quiet ride with responsive handling and firm braking. This is a turn-key example for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-quality vehicle that has been treated with genuine care since day one.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating dependable performance, it offers a refined driving experience without compromise. Every system has been thoroughly vetted to ensure operational excellence. Secure a vehicle that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional long-term value.
